attempts.diagnosis: Found that 'if not value:' in default_filter treats 0 as falsy
attempts.fix_attempted: Changed 'if not value:' to 'if value is None:' in filters.py
attempts.outcome: PARTIAL SUCCESS - default_filter bug fixed, but some tests still failed

attempts.action: After fixing default_filter, ran tests again and found template rendering issues
attempts.result: Tests like test_variable_with_upper_filter weren't working as expected
attempts.diagnosis: The renderer wasn't properly applying filters - the processed result wasn't being used correctly
attempts.fix_attempted: Examined renderer.py and found that _apply_filters returns processed template but then template.render uses original context
attempts.outcome: FAILED - The renderer was replacing {{name|upper}} with {{name}} but template.render was using context directly

attempts.result: The replace_with_filters function processes the value but returns '{{' + var_name + '}}' - it doesn't actually substitute the filtered value!
attempts.diagnosis: The renderer applies filters but then throws away the filtered result and just returns the variable name placeholder
attempts.fix_attempted: Changed the replacement to use the filtered value instead of just the var name
attempts.outcome: PARTIAL - Now filters are applied but braces in content are still an issue

attempts.result: Found that the regex {{(.*?)}} can match partial expressions and doesn't escape literal braces
attempts.diagnosis: When content has raw '{{' it gets incorrectly matched as a variable expression
attempts.fix_attempted: Improved the regex to properly handle edge cases: r'{{\s*(\w+)(?:\|.*?)?}}' for simpler cases, or use a negative lookahead

files.change: Changed 'if not value:' to 'if value is None:' in default_filter
files.explanation: The default filter was treating 0 and empty string as falsy, which replaced valid values with defaults

files.change: Changed replacement to actually use filtered value: return str(value)
files.explanation: The renderer was applying filters but not using the filtered result in the output

lessons_learned: Multiple bugs can interact - fixing one can reveal another
Filter functions need careful handling of edge cases like 0 and empty string
The renderer was architecturally flawed - it processed filters but didn't use the result
Template systems need careful regex to distinguish variables from literal braces
